member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CertificateIssuanceService
member.summary: Service for issuing X.509 certificates using KAZ-SIGN. Implements certificate creation from CSRs with CA signature. Supports all KAZ-SIGN security levels (128, 192, 256).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CertificateIssuanceService.DetermineSignatureAlgorithm(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Determines the signature algorithm based on CA secret key size.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CertificateIssuanceService.GetAlgorithmOidEncoded(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Gets the encoded OID for the specified algorithm.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.ICaKeyProvider
member.summary: Interface for providing CA key material.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.DerBuilder
member.summary: Simple DER builder for constructing ASN.1 structures.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CsrParserService
member.summary: Service for parsing PKCS#10 Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs). Implements ASN.1/DER parsing with KAZ-SIGN-256 signature verification.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.Asn1Reader
member.summary: Simple ASN.1/DER reader for parsing CSRs.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.FileBasedCaKeyProvider
member.summary: File-based CA key provider for development/testing. In production, use HSM-based provider.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CaKeyOptions.PublicKeyPath
member.summary: Path to the CA public key file.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CaKeyOptions.SecretKeyPath
member.summary: Path to the CA secret key file.
